name: Phyllis Diller
description: American stand-up comedian, actress, author, musician, and visual artist (1917–2012)
abstract: Phyllis Ada Diller (née Driver; July 17, 1917 – August 20, 2012) was an American stand-up comedian, actress, author, musician and visual artist, noted for her  eccentric stage persona, characterized by her self-deprecating humor, wild hair and clothes, and exaggerated, cackling laugh. Diller was one of the first female comics to become a…

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Williams
about_quotes.evidence: The transcript contains no mention of Phyllis Diller by the interviewee Dave Williams, nor any interaction between them. The name appears only in a monologue by the interviewer.

about_quotes.speaker: Pete Barbutti
about_quotes.evidence: I put people together that had never been together before to see if the sparks would fly... Like Phyllis Diller and Irwin Corey... I put all these crazy people together and it worked great.
about_quotes.doc_title: Pete Barbutti interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 8, 2022
